CREATE TABLE test_bitwise (id INT, value INT);
SELECT id, value, ~value AS bitwise_not FROM test_bitwise;
SELECT id, value, ~value AS bitwise_not FROM test_bitwise WHERE value > 0;
SELECT id, ~value AS negated_value FROM test_bitwise WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_bitwise WHERE value < 0);
SELECT b.id, ~a.value AS negated_value FROM test_bitwise a JOIN test_bitwise b ON a.id = b.id WHERE a.value = 1;
CREATE TABLE test_complex (id INT, value INT, extra_value INT);
SELECT c.id, ~c.value AS negated_value FROM test_complex c WHERE c.extra_value IN (SELECT a.value FROM test_complex a WHERE a.value < 3);
SELECT a.id, ~b.value AS negated_value FROM test_bitwise a JOIN test_complex b ON a.id = b.id WHERE a.value IS NOT NULL;
